Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 388 upvotes, 80 comments
  2. In space, no one can hear you kernel panic (2020) 46 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Jepsen: MariaDB Galera Cluster 12.1.2 32 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language 58 upvotes, 9 comments
  5. Monkey Island for Commodore 64 Ground Up 44 upvotes, 7 comments
  6. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025) 349 upvotes, 101 comments
  7. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 176 upvotes, 54 comments
  8. Lf-lean: The frontier of verified software engineering 31 upvotes, 7 comments
  9. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 391 upvotes, 171 comments
  10. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 360 upvotes, 159 comments
  11. Claude Tips for 3D Work 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  12. Why I love FreeBSD 387 upvotes, 192 comments
  13. Lies I was told about collaborative editing, Part 2: Why we don't use Yjs 227 upvotes, 107 comments
  14. Every layer of review makes you 10x slower 59 upvotes, 22 comments
  15. Home Assistant waters my plants 269 upvotes, 134 comments
  16. Show HN: Thermal Receipt Printers – Markdown and Web UI 59 upvotes, 23 comments
  17. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 460 upvotes, 251 comments
  18. Canopy Height Maps v2 22 upvotes, 6 comments
  19. Language model teams as distributed systems 84 upvotes, 39 comments
  20. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 1412 upvotes, 912 comments
  21. Show HN: Oxyde – Pydantic-native async ORM with a Rust core 91 upvotes, 48 comments
  22. Pyodide: a Python distribution based on WebAssembly 29 upvotes, 11 comments
  23. Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games 211 upvotes, 132 comments
  24. Starlink Mini as a failover 229 upvotes, 175 comments
  25. The American Healthcare Conundrum 293 upvotes, 258 comments
  26. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 71 upvotes, 56 comments
  27. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 114 upvotes, 136 comments
  28. AirPods Max 2 246 upvotes, 434 comments
  29. Beyond has dropped “meat” from its name and expanded its high-protein drink line 92 upvotes, 162 comments
  30. AnswerThis (YC F25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 1:30pm, 17 March 2026. Source here.
